message:
test(nav): drop war-stories navbar expectation

Tests:
- Replace the /architecture -> /war-stories navbar smoke test with /architecture -> /how-it-was-built.
- Keeps the historical regression guard (scroll to bottom, navigate via header link, assert scroll resets + no console/page errors).

App:
- app/war-stories/page.tsx now returns a hard 404 via notFound() to reflect removal of the dedicated War Stories section without deleting files.
- app/war-stories/opengraph-image.tsx also returns 404 to avoid generating share assets for a removed page.

Navigation:
- Remove the dead War Stories icon/label mappings from components/site-header.tsx (navItems no longer includes the section).
